audit_items.proof_trace: Logic error in node navigation when both HAS_BEFORE2 and HAS_BEFORE3 flags are set. The nodeHasBefore3 condition incorrectly uses the original node instead of the updated node from nodeHasBefore2 branch, causing incorrect index calculation that could point to freed memory.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Supply collation rule input that creates nodes with both HAS_BEFORE2 and HAS_BEFORE3 flags set, triggering incorrect node navigation that computes an index pointing to deallocated memory, leading to use-after-free when the index is subsequently used.
